hero.title: Empowering Learners at
hero.description: We're on a mission to make quality English education accessible to everyone, everywhere. Our platform connects passionate learners with expert tutors from around the world.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize English language education by providing affordable, personalized, and effective learning experiences that empower individuals to achieve their communication goals and unlock new opportunities.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where language barriers no longer limit potential. We envision a global community of confident English speakers who can connect, collaborate, and succeed in any environment.

story.title: Our
story.paragraph1: EngConnect was born from a simple observation: despite countless language learning apps and resources, many people still struggle to speak English confidently. We realized that the missing piece was genuine human connection.
story.paragraph2: Founded in 2025, we set out to build a platform that combines the best of technology with the irreplaceable value of one-on-one human interaction. Our AI-powered tools enhance learning, but our expert tutors bring the lessons to life.
story.paragraph3: Today, we're proud to have helped over 50,000 students from 120+ countries improve their English skills and achieve their dreams, whether that's landing a dream job, studying abroad, or simply connecting with people from around the world.

values.title: Our Core
values.description: These principles guide everything we do and shape how we serve our community

passion.title: Passion for Learning
passion.description: We believe in the transformative power of education and are dedicated to making learning enjoyable.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously improve our platform with cutting-edge technology to enhance the learning experience.

community.title: Community
community.description: We foster a supportive global community where learners and tutors grow together.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We maintain the highest standards in everything from tutor selection to lesson quality.

cta.title: Join Our Growing Community
cta.description: Start your English learning journey today and become part of a global community of learners achieving their goals.

detail.description: This comprehensive course is designed to help you master essential English skills. Through carefully crafted lessons, interactive exercises, and real-world applications, you'll build confidence and achieve fluency. Our expert instructor will guide you every step of the way.
detail.learn1: Master essential vocabulary and grammar structures
detail.learn2: Develop confident speaking and listening skills

detail.learn4: Receive personalized feedback and progress tracking
